text.title: growth-twitter-x-growth Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for growth-twitter-x-growth as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Thread hook: "I have 10 tips for growing on Twitter [thread]"
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Generic number-list hooks are overused. The algorithm sees low engagement on tweet 1 and does not distribute the thread. Use niche-specific, counterintuitive hooks instead.

failure-mode.description: Inconsistent posting — missing days or weeks.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: X's algorithm reduces distribution for accounts with erratic cadence. Even one tweet per day maintains algorithm favor; missing multiple days resets momentum.

failure-mode.description: Only promotional content — no value posts.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Promotional-only accounts get unfollowed. The 80% value / 20% promo ratio is minimum; accounts under 1K followers should be 95/5.

failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: X significantly reduces distribution of tweets with external links. Links belong in the first reply, pinned tweet, or bio.
